intro.bodyLine1: These terms govern your use of journify.ai.
intro.bodyLine2: The terms of an actual sprint engagement are set out in a separate signed agreement, not on this page.

sections.heading: Who we are
sections.bodyLine1: Journify is an eenmanszaak registered in the Netherlands.
sections.bodyLine4: Registered address: De Quackstraat 54B, 3082VV, Rotterdam, Netherlands

sections.heading: Using this site
sections.bodyLine1: You may read, link to, and share content on this site.
sections.bodyLine2: You may not scrape, crawl, mirror, or systematically extract content for resale or redistribution.
sections.bodyLine3: You may not attempt to reverse engineer, copy, or replicate the systems described on this site for the purpose of selling them as your own.

sections.heading: Intellectual property
sections.bodyLine1: All content on this site, including the writing, the system diagrams, the case study, and the underlying methodology, belongs to Journify.
sections.bodyLine2: You can quote short excerpts with attribution. Anything more requires written permission.

sections.heading: Service engagements
sections.bodyLine1: This site describes a service called the 45-Day Sprint. Reading the site does not create a service agreement.
sections.bodyLine2: If you book a fit call and decide to work together, the terms of that engagement are set out in a separate signed agreement covering scope, deliverables, payment, and timelines.
sections.bodyLine3: These site terms do not override that agreement.

sections.heading: No guarantees
sections.bodyLine1: The site describes outcomes from past work. It does not promise specific outcomes for future engagements.
sections.bodyLine2: Reading the site, downloading anything from it, or booking a call does not guarantee any business result for you.
sections.bodyLine3: What we promise contractually is set out in a signed engagement agreement, not here.

sections.heading: Liability
sections.bodyLine1: We're not liable for indirect, consequential, or incidental losses arising from your use of this site.
sections.bodyLine2: If you act on information from the site without a signed agreement, you do so at your own risk.

sections.heading: Governing law
sections.bodyLine1: These terms are governed by the laws of the Netherlands.
sections.bodyLine2: Any disputes will be resolved in the courts of Rotterdam.

sections.heading: Changes to these terms
sections.bodyLine1: If these terms change, the "last updated" date at the top of the page will reflect the change.
sections.bodyLine2: Continued use of the site after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
